description: Back on Zephyr One, Deke is sent in to interrogate Sharpe, leveraging his 'white privilege' to try a different approach. He pretends to bond with Sharpe, while cleverly steering the conversation to Project Helius. Sharpe yells Communist insults but lets slip technical details: Helius doesn't currently work without a huge energy source—which Deke realizes could be supplied by a Chronicom, making Helius a bomb threatening all of S.H.I.E.L.D.'s top scientists.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: You, my friend, just lost me a bet. See, I thought you'd crack. Didn't realize who we were dealing with. Pardon the theatrics. Can't be too careful when you're testing your own.
